sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: contracts = total_equity / (optimal_f_dollars / CPA). Rebalance daily on current equity. System-specific optimal f derived from historical trade analysis; CPA (Chosen Percentage Allocation) is user-defined per market system.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing the optimal f value (dollars per contract) into the total account equity, then applying a percentage allocation (CPA) to arrive at the number of contracts to trade for each market system.
